description_long: This bungalow features a modern, boxy design with a mix of dark and light exterior finishes. The front facade is dominated by large, symmetrical windows with white framing and a central door, flanked by a spacious wooden deck furnished with outdoor seating and a table. The left side reveals a small balcony with white railings and a landscaped garden area with shrubs and flowers. The rear and right sides display horizontal siding in a light wood tone, with a prominent bay window and additional balcony space. The roof is mostly flat with some raised sections, and the overall structure is compact yet multi-leveled. The landscaping and outdoor living spaces enhance its urban residential appeal.
description: A modern, multi-leveled bungalow with large windows, flat roofs, and a mix of dark and light exterior finishes, featuring a front deck and landscaped garden.
description_view_0: Front view showing symmetrical windows, central door, large wooden deck with seating, and landscaped garden.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the balcony with white railings, garden area, and the layered structure of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying horizontal siding, a prominent bay window, and a secondary balcony area.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the balcony, deck, and the overall depth of the building's structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with bay window on rear facade
